name: leba
description: Stream movies and TV shows via torrents

scripts.bundle: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('public','dist/public',{recursive:true});" && npx esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:utp-native --external:node-datachannel --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate --target=node20 --banner:js="import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);" && node -e "try{require('fs').copyFileSync('.env','dist/.env');console.log('Copied .env to dist/')}catch{}"
